title: Keep Document — Person Extension
description: Extension schema for Keep documents of kind 'person'. Validated in addition to the core document schema. Defines genealogical fields required for person documents.

birth_date.title: Birth Date
birth_date.description: Date of birth in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format.

death_date.title: Death Date
death_date.description: Date of death in ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD format. Omit if the person is living.
